title: darwiniera bergoldii
side_effects: Darwiniera bergoldii can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and gastrointestinal issues. In some cases, improper use can lead to more severe reactions, including respiratory problems, headaches, and dizziness. Long-term exposure to the plant's toxic compounds can also cause damage to the liver and kidneys, potentially leading to chronic health issues. It is essential to consult with a medical professional or a qualified herbalist before using Darwiniera bergoldii or any other plant for medicinal purposes.
